summary: Completed comprehensive testing of S1.4A Trade History Normalization. TradeBuilder successfully reconstructs closed trades from fills with complete trade statistics. Core functionality working excellently with 88.9% success rate.

routing_issues.issue: Returns 404 'Trade not found' due to FastAPI route pattern conflict
routing_issues.impact: Trade summary endpoint not accessible, but individual trade and stats endpoints work
routing_issues.details: Route pattern conflicts with /runs/{run_id}/trades/{trade_id} - 'summary' being matched as trade_id

passed_tests: Run Simulation - Generated 51 trades with complete trade_stats ✅
Get Closed Trades - Retrieved 51 trades with all required fields ✅
Get Trade Statistics - All required stats present (win_rate: 33.33%, profit_factor: 1.0174, expectancy: 0.05) ✅
Get Specific Trade - Individual trade retrieval working ✅
Manual Normalization - Manual trigger working, normalized 51 trades ✅
Trade Filters - Winners/losers filtering working correctly (17 winners, 34 losers) ✅
TradeBuilder reconstruction - Successfully handles averaging and partial exits ✅
PnL calculation - Gross/net PnL with fees (total_fees: 20.24) ✅
Comprehensive TradeStats - All required metrics: win_rate, profit_factor, expectancy, avg_win, avg_loss, largest_win, largest_loss, total_fees, avg_duration_bars ✅
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix FastAPI route pattern conflict for trade summary endpoint. Move specific routes (/trades/summary, /trades/stats) before generic route (/trades/{trade_id}) in metrics_routes.py to resolve 404 issue. Core S1.4A functionality is working excellently.
